testcase.name: unsubscribe_shouldSucceed

2026-05-12T02:30:12.303+03:00 INFO 18688 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.digitalart.integration.controller.SubscriptionControllerTest]: SubscriptionControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-12T02:30:12.306+03:00 INFO 18688 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.digitalart.DigitalArtApplication for test class com.digitalart.integration.controller.SubscriptionControllerTest

testcase.name: subscribe_toSelf_shouldReturnError
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T02:30:14.048+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /api/subscriptions/1 2026-05-12T02:30:14.048+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /api/subscriptions/1 === Subscribe request === Authentication from SecurityContext: UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]] User email from authentication: user User found: user (ID: 1)

testcase.name: subscribe_shouldSucceed
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T02:30:14.065+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /api/subscriptions/2 2026-05-12T02:30:14.066+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /api/subscriptions/2 === Subscribe request === Authentication from SecurityContext: UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]] User email from authentication: user User found: user (ID: 1) Subscription created successfully

testcase.name: getSubscriberCount_shouldReturnCount
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-12T02:30:14.082+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /api/subscriptions/artist/2/count 2026-05-12T02:30:14.082+03:00 DEBUG 18688 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured GET /api/subscriptions/artist/2/count
